choices.text: Why does my house look like this.

dialogueLines.text: Before you start asking wuestions I can explain.  My name is Chime, a guide fairy who exists in the astral plane which is where you are right now.  This is the astral form of your house.

The astral plane is a place where memories are revisited and can be altered, by the powers you gained.  I'm a guide meant for you to unlock your powers and alter the past events.  Earlier today your friends mentioned the loss of someone close and how they wished they could have changed the past events, you've been granted with the ability to change those events altering the future that you exist in.
Can you help your firends live forward without regret back in your reality?
I think you're the hero, you just don't know it yet.
I saw you grab a map before you went to bed last night, do you still have it?  It will come in handy on our journey.
Okay so we have to go through that north gate on the other side of the graveyard.  Grab your backpack and lets start heading over there.
